title: New Trapped Chest
description: This resource pack changes the default Trapped Chest to an improved Red Trapped Chest.
body:
> # ****New Trapped Chest****
> > ###     What does it change?
> >
> > - This resource pack replaces the standard single trapped chest with an improved red trapped chest.
> > - And it also changes the standard double chest to the same improved red chest trap.
> > 
> > ![Main Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90acc5240130034569fc8299406a5a0dfd2a740c.jpeg)
> > Sorry for the blackout
> 
> > ### Incompatibilities:
> > - Didn't find it
> 
> > ### Mistakes
> > - on versions from 1.6.1 to 1.14.4 there is a problem due to which the chest is displayed incorrectly since on the next versions the textures of all chests have been changed (this will be fixed soon)
> > ![ Version of the problem 1.6.1 - 1.14.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68a420b8317236bc4a829fb67582961bcb2d789a.png)
